custodian: NYC Department of Buildings FOIL Unit
records_requested: Pre-2000 new building permits, job filings, permit issuance logs, or equivalent records with address, BBL, BIN, filing date, permit date, and dwelling-unit fields where available.
notes: Primary archival lane for pre-reform outcome measurement.

records_requested: Board of Estimate minutes, land-use calendars, decision logs, and related materials relevant to land-use approvals before the 1990 charter reform.
notes: Use for institutional and project-level archival context.

records_requested: City Council proceedings, committee records, and land-use materials relevant to ULURP and member deference after the Board of Estimate was abolished.
notes: Use for the post-reform institutional lane.

records_requested: Property-record continuity pull only if BBL or address linkage becomes a blocker in the archival workflow.
notes: Do not pursue unless the lot-identifier pipeline breaks.
